<div style="display:flex; align-items:flex-start; gap:32px; flex-wrap:wrap;">

<img src="images/profile.jpg" width="220" style="border-radius:50%; object-fit:cover;">

<div>

## Doç. Dr. Volkan Işık

**Social Policy | Labour Economics | Social Entrepreneurship**

Hacettepe Üniversitesi  
Sosyal Bilimler MYO

📧 volkani@hacettepe.edu.tr  

<i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/doç-dr-volkan-ışık-79150bbb/" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a> | 
<i class="bi bi-twitter-x"></i> <a href="https://x.com/volkannisık" target="_blank">X</a> | 
<i class="bi bi-building"></i> <a href="https://avesis.hacettepe.edu.tr/volkani" target="_blank">Hacettepe</a> | 
<i class="bi bi-journal-text"></i> <a href="https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/record/ADT-9246-2022" target="_blank">Web of Science</a> | 
<i class="bi bi-person-badge"></i> <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3690-969X" target="_blank">ORCID</a>

</div>
</div>

---

## About Me

I am an academic specializing in **labour economics, social policy, and social entrepreneurship**.

My research focuses on:

- Labour market dynamics
- Gender inequality and employment
- Social entrepreneurship ecosystems
- AI and future of work  

---

## Recent Posts

- [İlk Yazım](blog.qmd)

---

## Contact

You can reach me via email for academic collaboration and research inquiries.
